description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage called deploy. Add a job named pages that runs in the deploy stage. The pages job should execute the exact shell commands: make -C vendor, mkdir public, cp -a vendor modules *.css public, and cp -a angulator-demo.html public/index.html. It must publish the public/ directory as an artifact (paths: public) and no specific Docker image, services, caches, or triggers are required.
